introSection: Crystal Wing is a steel flying roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Chaoyang, Beijing, China. Crystal Wing was built by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened in 2006. It is a clone of Superman Ultimate Flight at Six Flags Over Georgia and is the only clone not to have a Superman theme.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Between 2010 and 2012, the colour scheme was changed from brown track with purple supports to yellow track with blue supports.

fullText:
Crystal Wing is a steel flying roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Chaoyang, Beijing, China. Crystal Wing was built by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened in 2006. It is a clone of Superman Ultimate Flight at Six Flags Over Georgia and is the only clone not to have a Superman theme.

Between 2010 and 2012, the colour scheme was changed from brown track with purple supports to yellow track with blue supports.
